\tzpentry{ID3457}{Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3457 introduces Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ T^{\mu\nu}_{\rm EM} \;=\; \sum_{\alpha,\beta,\rho} g^{\mu\alpha}g^{\nu\beta}F_{\alpha\rho}F_{\beta}{}^{\rho}\;-\;\tfrac14 g^{\mu\nu} I. \]
